description.overview: The Thai Ridgeback is an ancient pariah dog with a distinctive hair ridge running along its back.
description.temperament: TRDs are loyal and protective but independent and reserved. They bond closely with one person or family.
description.health: Generally healthy. May be prone to dermoid sinus.
description.exercise: High energy. Need daily vigorous exercise and secure areas.

verdict.summary: Ancient Thai dogs with distinctive ridges and independent spirits. Thai Ridgebacks are loyal but need experienced, patient owners.
